Open Source CLI

Your app collects user data.
Where are your legal docs?

Codepliant scans your codebase and generates privacy policies, terms of service, AI disclosures, and 35+ compliance documents automatically.

npx codepliant goView on GitHub
97.8%Detection precision
35+Document types
626Tests passing
10+Ecosystems

The old way vs. Codepliant

Compliance should not be a manual, error-prone process.

Copy-paste templates from the internet→Documents generated from your actual code
Answer 50+ questions in a form builder→One command, zero questions asked
Pay a lawyer $2,000+ per document→Free for open source, $29/mo for teams
Documents outdated within weeks→Re-scan on every deploy to stay current
Miss GDPR or AI Act requirements entirely→97.8% detection precision across 100 repos

How it works

  1. 01

    Install

    npm install -g codepliant

    Works with Node.js 18+. No account required.

  2. 02

    Scan

    npx codepliant go

    Detects data collection, ORMs, APIs, analytics, auth, and AI usage across your codebase.

  3. 03

    Ship

    35+ documents generated

    Privacy policy, terms of service, cookie policy, AI disclosure, and more — ready to publish.

Tested on real projects

We ran Codepliant against popular open source codebases.

ProjectDocs generatedCategory
cal.com23Scheduling platform
chatwoot24Customer engagement
twenty19Open source CRM

EU AI Act deadline

Article 50 transparency obligations take effect August 2, 2026

140 days remaining

If your application uses AI, you must disclose it to users. Codepliant generates EU AI Act compliant disclosures from your codebase automatically.

Learn about AI disclosure requirements

One command. Full compliance.
